use_case: Jurisdiction in HNA refresh window with workforce gap
recipient_role: Community Dev Director / Housing Program Mgr
subject: Workforce housing partnership — IndiBuild + [jurisdiction]
body: Hi [name] — I noticed [jurisdiction] is refreshing its Housing Needs Assessment. IndiBuild is a Colorado-focused affordable + workforce housing developer specializing in [9% LIHTC / workforce rental / mixed-income]. Were already tracking [jurisdiction] for the upcoming planning cycle and would love to learn how we might support delivery on the HNAs workforce findings — whether through a specific project, partnership on city-owned land, or co-development on a third-party site. Would a 30-min call in the next two weeks work? I can bring our analysis of [jurisdictions] capture advantage + Prop 123 alignment to make the conversation concrete. — Paul / IndiBuild
notes_for_personalization: Pull the HNA URL from local-resources.json. Mention the specific HNA finding that aligns with IndiBuilds capacity.

subject: [Project name] — IndiBuild qualifications + preliminary scope
body: Hi [name] — IndiBuild is preparing a response to [RFP name] due [date]. Before submitting, Id welcome a short call to confirm fit and clarify two scope questions: (1) [insert specific question on AMI mix or land control], (2) [insert specific question on partnership preferences]. We want to make sure our submission reflects what [jurisdiction] is actually looking for, not what we assume. 20 minutes whenever works. — Paul / IndiBuild
notes_for_personalization: Cite the RFP by name and number. Pre-write the two clarifying questions; they signal seriousness.

use_case: Jurisdiction with active land bank but no recent project
subject: Land bank activation — possible workforce project on [parcel]
body: Hi [name] — IndiBuild specializes in workforce + LIHTC delivery on partner-controlled land. We noticed [land bank name] has [parcel] in its inventory and were wondering whether it has been put through a feasibility review or is open to partnership proposals. Wed welcome a short call to walk through what a partnership might look like — were comfortable taking the development risk if the land is contributed at a workable basis. — Paul / IndiBuild
notes_for_personalization: Pull parcel info from the land bank record. Reference the FMR + capture advantage from COHO Capture column.

use_case: New director or council member in jurisdiction
subject: Welcome to [jurisdiction] — quick intro from IndiBuild
body: Hi [name] — congratulations on the new role at [jurisdiction]. Im Paul with IndiBuild, a CO affordable + workforce housing developer. As you settle in, Id welcome a brief intro call (15 min) to share what were seeing in [jurisdiction]s housing landscape and where we think theres delivery opportunity. No agenda beyond a relationship — just want to be on your radar when projects come up. — Paul / IndiBuild
notes_for_personalization: Send within 30 days of role start. Reference one specific thing about the jurisdiction (HNA, Prop 123 status) to show youve done homework.

subject: Quick check-in — [jurisdiction] housing landscape
body: Hi [name] — checking in on [jurisdiction]s housing pipeline. We last connected in [date] when [specific topic]. A few things weve seen in the broader CO market this quarter [insert 2 bullets]. Anything moving on your side that we should know about? Happy to share what were tracking. — Paul / IndiBuild
notes_for_personalization: Use sparingly — once per quarter max per relationship. Generic check-ins erode goodwill if overused.
